underlying_goal: Build a complete pet diary feature with multi-step entry creation, connect it to Supabase, integrate RAG, then iterate on the full React Native pet care app including renaming, UI polish, pet editing, and deploying an Android APK
friction_detail: Android build failed repeatedly due to JVM/JDK version mismatches and missing config; auto-save didn't persist requiring multiple fix iterations; mock data had to be explicitly removed after Claude included it.
brief_summary: User built a full pet diary system, renamed the app, added pet editing with auto-save, and deployed an Android APK — mostly achieved despite significant build environment friction and iterative bug fixes.
